_README: Per-chain peer-protocol + reference-asset config consumed by contracts/script/SlippageCensusPreDeploy.s.sol. Address provenance MUST be verified against each peer protocol's official docs before any production use — see docs/SlippageCensusGuide.md.
_README_peer_protocols: All peer-protocol addresses sourced from each protocol's official deployment registry: Aave V3 PoolDataProvider from aave.com/docs/resources/addresses; Compound V3 Comet from docs.compound.finance/#networks (one Comet per base asset — pick the chain's largest by liquidity for v1); Morpho-Blue from docs.morpho.org. Set to '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' to skip a peer on a chain where it isn't deployed.
_README_reference_assets: Per-tier reference asset lists are CONSTITUTION-LEVEL — set at deploy via OracleAdminFacet.setTierReferenceAssets. The autonomous tier-LTV cache reads these assets' LTVs from each configured peer and aggregates per-tier median + bound-check. List membership must be audited.
_README_chain_1: Ethereum mainnet. Reference assets chosen so each one is listed as collateral on BOTH Aave V3 + Compound V3 cUSDCv3 — Compound's base-asset stables (USDC / USDT / DAI) are deliberately NOT in any tier ref list because Compound's cUSDCv3 doesn't list its own base asset (USDC) as a separate collateral, so a stable-only list would fail per-asset consensus.
_README_chain_56: BNB Smart Chain. Morpho-Blue not deployed on BNB per docs.morpho.org as of training data; zero-address skips that peer.
_README_chain_137: Polygon PoS mainnet. Aave V3 and Compound V3 cUSDCv3 both deployed; Morpho-Blue not deployed on Polygon PoS per docs.morpho.org as of training data; zero-address skips that peer.
_README_caveat: Addresses above are sourced from training-data knowledge and are likely-but-not-guaranteed correct. Verify each against the peer protocol's official docs before submitting any production-cycle refresh. Out-of-date peer addresses just produce 'no readings' (the per-asset consensus check fails when no peer reports), so a stale config doesn't write garbage — but it does waste a refresh call. Specifically: Aave V3 addresses at https://aave.com/docs/resources/addresses, Compound V3 at https://docs.compound.finance/#networks, Morpho-Blue at https://docs.morpho.org.
